holdings.infoBox: VXF is an equity ETF with a total of 3343 individual holdings. The top holdings are Slcmt1142 stock at 2.17%, Marvell Technology at 2.11%, Snowflake at 1.03%, Cloudflare at 0.91%, and Bloom Energy at 0.87%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Extended Market ETF (VXF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Completion index. The fund is passively managed to provide exposure to the US equity space. It holds mid- and small-cap stocks. VXF was launched on Dec 27, 2001 and is issued by Vanguard.
